title: WebhookEvent
$comment: A7 SDK hardening: event_type is constrained and payload is typed through a oneOf mapping over event_type const values. Conservative public-safe subset grounded in the current public SDK contract surface. This schema does not close DD-3 and does not declare B2 complete. Payloads expose public identifiers, status, and provenance only; they must not encode matching weights, trust weights/tiers, scoring or ranking formulas, learning rules, tenant knowledge-graph internals, raw prompts, hidden reasoning, or private engine/Core internals.

event_type.description: Public webhook event type. Constrained to the published in-repo catalogue in docs/WEBHOOKS.md.

payload.description: Typed, public-safe event payload. The concrete shape is selected by event_type via the oneOf discriminator below.

InvoiceMatchedPayload.title: InvoiceMatchedPayload
InvoiceMatchedPayload.description: Public-safe payload for the invoice.matched event. Public identifiers, status, and provenance only.

invoice_id.description: Public identifier of the invoice the match result pertains to.

status_color.description: Public match status indicator, aligned with match_result.status_color (ADR-0008). A reported status only; the underlying thresholds remain server-side and are not encoded here.

method.description: Public-safe provenance of the match, aligned with match_result.evidence[].method (FD-11 / AC-R2). A provenance flag only; it must not encode weights, trust tiers, scoring formulas, or any private engine internals.

InvoiceReviewRequiredPayload.title: InvoiceReviewRequiredPayload
InvoiceReviewRequiredPayload.description: Public-safe payload for the invoice.review_required event. Public identifiers and status only.

invoice_id.description: Public identifier of the invoice flagged for human review.

status_color.description: Public match status indicator, aligned with match_result.status_color (ADR-0008). A reported status only; review thresholds remain server-side and are not encoded here.

FeedbackReceivedPayload.title: FeedbackReceivedPayload
FeedbackReceivedPayload.description: Public-safe payload for the feedback.received event. Public identifiers and the recorded feedback action only.

invoice_line_id.description: Public identifier of the invoice line the feedback pertains to.

action.description: Recorded feedback action, aligned with the public feedback.action vocabulary (schemas/feedback.schema.json). A recorded action only; it carries no learning rule or scoring logic.

MaterialSuggestionCreatedPayload.title: MaterialSuggestionCreatedPayload
MaterialSuggestionCreatedPayload.description: Public-safe payload for the material.suggestion.created event. Public identifiers only; the review-only suggestion content, scoring, and any AI reasoning are deliberately not exposed here.

suggestion_id.description: Public identifier of the review-only suggestion that was created.

material_id.description: Public identifier of the material the suggestion relates to.
